# fitness-ai-mcp
# Health and fitness tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install
```bash
pip install fitness-ai-mcp
```

## Auth & Rate Limits
- Free tier: 10 calls/day. No API key required.
- Pro tier (£79/mo): unlimited + signed attestations.
- Enterprise (£1,499/mo): white-label.

## Tools

### `generate_workout`
Generate a complete workout plan tailored to goals and equipment.

### `track_calories`
Track daily calorie and macronutrient intake from food entries.

### `calculate_body_composition`
Calculate BMI, body fat estimate, BMR, and TDEE.

### `build_training_plan`
Build a multi-week training program with periodization.

### `check_exercise_form`
Get exercise form cues, common mistakes, and muscle activation info.


## Maintainer
MEOK AI Labs · hello@meok.ai · https://meok.ai · MIT licensed

## Pairs with
Governance moat: pair this tool with any of MEOK's 38 governance MCPs (EU AI Act, DORA, NIS2, CRA, GDPR, ISO 42001, etc.) for full compliance coverage.
